workflow_priorities.label: Warehouse / fulfillment / 3PL
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Still the clearest real robot workflow lane for exact-site hosted review, brownfield automation, and case-handling proof.

workflow_priorities.label: Advanced manufacturing / intralogistics
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Austin has strong advanced manufacturing density, and 2026 robot demand remains grounded in repetitive movement, handling, and plant-floor workflows.

workflow_priorities.label: Industrial inspection
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Inspection robots remain active in industrial environments and can map cleanly to exact-site review and recency-sensitive site assets.

workflow_priorities.label: Semiconductor and clean manufacturing support environments
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Central Texas semiconductor growth creates high-value, constrained, site-specific environments, though access friction is higher.

workflow_priorities.label: Cargo / airport-adjacent logistics
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Important for warehouse and logistics buyers, but usually secondary to larger inland warehouse and manufacturing facilities.

priority_proof_targets.name: Tesla Gigafactory Texas
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: manufacturing intralogistics, mobile handling, material movement
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Very high. Strong exact-site proof value for manufacturing and supply-chain robotics buyers.
priority_proof_targets.accessApproach: operator-lane or founder/operator introduction; not open capture-first by default

priority_proof_targets.name: Kyle 35 Logistics Park
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: warehouse autonomy, handling, inventory movement, logistics support
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Very high. Directly tied to Tesla support logistics and warehouse-style workflows.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Official regional development references show Tesla expansion in the park.

priority_proof_targets.name: Austin Hills Commerce Center
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High. Good brownfield-style industrial proof environment.
priority_proof_targets.accessApproach: property / tenant identification, then targeted outreach

priority_proof_targets.name: Crossroads Logistics Center
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High. Strong fit for exact-site warehouse review workflows.

priority_proof_targets.name: Samsung Austin Semiconductor campus
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High but access-constrained. Valuable for premium proof if obtainable.

priority_proof_targets.name: Samsung Taylor fab
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High but highly constrained. Better as a strategic operator-lane target than an early open capture target.

priority_proof_targets.name: Taylor Mustang Creek Industrial Park
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Good cluster for adjacent exact-site manufacturing/logistics targets.

priority_proof_targets.name: Taylor Walnut Creek Commercial Park
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Strong follow-on target around the Samsung orbit.

priority_proof_targets.name: Georgetown Logistics Park
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High. Strong warehouse target with regional manufacturing adjacency.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Official and regional industrial development references.

priority_proof_targets.name: Austin-Bergstrom cargo and logistics zone
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Valuable for logistics buyers, though more fragmented.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Regional logistics and airport adjacency thesis.

priority_proof_targets.name: Del Valle industrial belt near Tesla
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High. Strong buyer-relevant orbit around Tesla.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Tesla orbit and Austin industrial growth references.

priority_proof_targets.name: Parmer Lane / TX-130 distribution buildings
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High. Good early wedge for warehouse proof packs.

priority_proof_targets.name: Round Rock logistics and distribution corridor
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Good next-wave warehouse density.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Regional employer and logistics density signals.

priority_proof_targets.name: Pflugerville industrial warehouse cluster
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: warehouse AMR, industrial inspection, material handling
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Useful for scaled warehouse capture coverage.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Regional industrial footprint around Austin northeast corridors.

priority_proof_targets.name: Buda logistics sites
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Strong adjacency to Kyle logistics and 3PL workflows.

priority_proof_targets.name: Amazon regional delivery / fulfillment facilities in metro Austin
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: warehouse handling, delivery logistics, conveyor / storage review
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: High if obtainable; good reference lane for fulfillment robotics buyers.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Austin Chamber major employers map references Amazon delivery operations.

priority_proof_targets.name: Arrive Logistics operating facilities
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: freight and logistics operations, warehouse-adjacent workflows
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium. More useful as a logistics demand cluster than a first proof asset.

priority_proof_targets.name: Foreign Trade Zone 183-adjacent facilities
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Good for logistics and inspection buyers.

priority_proof_targets.name: Bastrop advanced manufacturing cluster
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Strong secondary manufacturing lane.

priority_proof_targets.name: Northeast Austin light-industrial infill warehouses
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium. Useful for broad adjacent-site proof inventory.

priority_proof_targets.name: South Austin / Kyle tenant warehouses supporting Tesla orbit
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Strong next-wave supply-chain orbit.
priority_proof_targets.sourceNote: Regional development and Tesla logistics expansion signals.

priority_proof_targets.name: Clean manufacturing support facilities around Samsung orbit
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: inspection, internal logistics, constrained facility support
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium-high. Good premium exact-site lane if access is possible.

priority_proof_targets.name: Austin Regional Manufacturing Association member facilities
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium. Useful as a discovery pool for candidate exact-site targets.

priority_proof_targets.name: Kuehne+Nagel Austin logistics operations
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium. More valuable as a logistics demand cluster and site-discovery lead.

priority_proof_targets.name: Industrial distributor and field-service branches serving Austin manufacturing
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Medium. Good fallback lane when high-security manufacturing access is slow.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Tesla / SH-130 manufacturing and logistics orbit
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Highest-value exact-site manufacturing and warehouse lane around Giga Texas and its support sites.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Kyle / Buda / South I-35 logistics corridor
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Best warehouse and 3PL density immediately south of Austin.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Northeast Austin / Parmer / TX-130 warehouses
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Strong warehouse AMR and fulfillment fit with lower access friction than flagship manufacturing sites.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Taylor semiconductor and industrial ecosystem
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: High-value manufacturing and inspection lane with Samsung-led gravity.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Round Rock / Georgetown logistics and distribution
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Good next-wave warehouse coverage and manufacturing adjacency.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: Bastrop advanced manufacturing and aerospace support
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Secondary manufacturing lane with interesting inspection and constrained-site value.

queued_lawful_access_buckets.label: ABIA cargo, airport-adjacent logistics, and FTZ-linked facilities
queued_lawful_access_buckets.rationale: Selective logistics and inspection targets that can round out proof coverage.

discovery_lanes.label: Warehouse / fulfillment / 3PL sites across the Austin-Kyle-Buda-Georgetown arc
discovery_lanes.rationale: Largest near-term robot-site opportunity set for exact-site hosted review.

discovery_lanes.label: Advanced manufacturing and industrial intralogistics facilities
discovery_lanes.rationale: High-value manufacturing environments around Tesla, Samsung, and related suppliers.

discovery_lanes.label: Industrial inspection environments
discovery_lanes.rationale: Inspection workflows remain active in 2026 and map well to site-specific proof packs.

discovery_lanes.label: Semiconductor and clean-manufacturing support environments
discovery_lanes.rationale: Smaller but strategically valuable exact-site lane with higher access friction.

discovery_lanes.label: Cargo, import/export, and airport-adjacent logistics facilities
discovery_lanes.rationale: Useful secondary logistics lane for broader warehouse and operations buyers.

discovery_lanes.label: Aerospace, defense, and advanced components manufacturing
discovery_lanes.rationale: Good secondary lane for manufacturing and inspection buyers in Central Texas.
